nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
nodes.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、Shining bronze cuckoo等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 新不列顛
nodes.summary: 新不列顛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Pied cuckoo-dove、Comb-crested jacana、Australasian darter等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: New Britain thrush
nodes.summary: The New Britain thrush (Zoothera talaseae) is a species of bird in the thrush family Turdidae. It is found in the montane forests on the Papua New Guinean islands of New Britain and Umboi. The Bougainville thrush was formerly considered to be conspecific with the New Britain thrush and together the complex was known as the black-backed thrush. References
